legacy_paragraph1: For generations, Manimaran Palgova has been a household name in Tamil Nadu — synonymous with the rich, melt-in-your-mouth taste of authentic Palgova. Our journey began in the heart of Pondicherry, where our founders believed that the finest sweets come from the finest care.
legacy_paragraph2: Every batch of our Palgova is slow-cooked the traditional way — no shortcuts, no preservatives. Just pure milk, pure ghee, and pure passion. Over the decades, we have grown, but our recipe and our commitment remain unchanged.
title: Our Story
content:
In the heart of every Tamil household, there is a sweet that carries the essence of tradition — Palgova. At Manimaran Palgova, we take pride in recreating the magic of this age-old delicacy, crafted with reverence and care.

Our Palkova is made the traditional way, using the purest milk and handpicked ingredients. Slow-cooked to perfection over hours, it’s a labor of love passed down through generations. Every spoonful is a tribute to the art of patience and the rich cultural heritage of Tamil Nadu.
